1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 category columns to find agricultural codes (distinct arjordbr, artype)

3.description: select AR50 polygons classified as agricultural (use codes found in step 2)

4.description: select parcels (teig) in Stavanger by kommunenummer

5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

8.description: return the first 10 parcels (teigid) in agricultural land

2.sql: SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr, artype FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" ORDER BY arjordbr NULLS LAST, artype NULLS LAST LIMIT 100;

3.sql: SELECT arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" GROUP BY arjordbr, artype, arkartstd ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 200;

4.sql: SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '1103';

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger by kommunenummer

3.description: load AR50 polygons (wkb_geometry) for spatial filtering

4.description: reduce AR50 to polygons intersecting Stavanger municipality

5.description: list distinct arjordbr values in reduced AR50 to identify agricultural class

6.description: filter reduced AR50 to agricultural land using the arjordbr value discovered in step 5

7.description: find parcels that intersect the agricultural AR50 polygons

8.description: collapse spatial join to one row per teigid (deduplicate parcels)

10.description: return the first 10 parcels sorted by teigid
